name: Blood On The Dusty Trail
short_description: In this thrilling audio book, we follow the story of Caleb, a young outlaw who finds himself on the run after a robbery. As he navigates the dangers of the Wild West, his gang of outlaws plan their get away.
detailed_description:
In this thrilling audio book, we follow the story of Caleb, a young outlaw who finds himself on the run after a robbery. As he navigates the dangers of the Wild West, his gang of outlaws plan their get away. Together, they embark on a daring run for their freedom and hopes that their payday has arrived.

Featuring full audio narration, you'll feel like you're part of the story with every word. Autoplay mode offers an audio book experience that immerses you in the story, while normal play allows for a more casual visual novel experience.
about_the_game:
